name: Bioquest Corp
business: Bioquest Corp is a development stage company that previously intended to market Hemp-CBD products but changed direction in 2022 to acquire companies in the green energy sector. On June 23, 2022, it executed a Letter of Intent to acquire Progressus Clean Technologies, Inc., a venture stage green technology company focused on the development of novel hydrogen generation and separation technologies. The company has generated no revenues and has no active employees.

exposures.sentence: Progressus is a venture stage green technology company focused on the development of novel hydrogen generation and separation technologies.

catalysts.event: Execution of Letter of Intent to acquire Progressus Clean Technologies
catalysts.sentence: On June 23, 2022, the Company executed a Letter of Intent with the shareholders of Progressus Clean Technologies, Inc.
